---
title: "Crystal Adote"
description: "Contributor to the NYC Open Data Lab"
---

## Projects & Publications

-   [Leading Causes of Death and Indoor Environmental Complaints](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-student-gallery.share.connect.posit.cloud/chapters/01-Final-Project-Crystal.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Portfolio

A curated collection of work developed using reproducible workflows in R and Quarto.

-   📘 [View Portfolio Book](https://019c7e87-9883-6209-abee-7d4f43167df7.share.connect.posit.cloud/)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contributions to the Lab

-   Contributor to the NYC Open Data Student Gallery\
-   Contributor to the development of the nycOpenData R package

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/crystalna20)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/crystal-adote-0305641ba/)\
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0006-7777-9798)
